channel.title: Support for WP search with pattern `/search/:query`
channel.description:
# [Frontity Roadmap :biking_man:](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Frontity-Roadmap-e6fac9339a474031b2bc9fd90a075b69) **--- [Feature card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Support-for-WP-search-with-pattern-search-query-a207bf1a58024dac82a37292943bd564)**
## Description Right now, there is a handler that supports the default WP search, `?s=:query`, but we should also support the pattern `/search/:query`, as WP also supports it.
## User stories >As a Frontity user >I want to be able to use the pattern `/search/:query` in my search urls >so that I can use the pattern I prefer.
## Possible solution We can create a handler for this.

item.title: Support for WP search with pattern `/search/:query`
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Frontity Roadmap

— Feature card

Description

Right now, there is a handler that supports the default WP search, ?s=:query, but we should also support the pattern /search/:query, as WP also supports it.

User stories

As a Frontity user
I want to be able to use the pattern /search/:query in my search urls
so that I can use the pattern I prefer.

Possible solution

We can create a handler for this.

Read full topic
item.source: Support for WP search with pattern `/search/:query`
